statement.informal: `rho_call` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (spot > 0.0 ∧ strike > 0.0 ∧ strike <= STRIKE_MAX ∧ vol > 0.0 ∧ rate >= -RATE_MAX ∧ rate <= RATE_MAX ∧ time_to_expiry >= TINY_T ∧ time_to_expiry <= T_MAX), the function's result satisfies (result >= 0.0). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
-- @verify obligation pulled from rho.eml
-- theorem rho_call_nonneg : ∀ args, (spot > 0.0 ∧ strike > 0.0 ∧ strike <= STRIKE_MAX ∧ vol > 0.0 ∧ rate >= -RATE_MAX ∧ rate <= RATE_MAX ∧ time_to_expiry >= TINY_T ∧ time_to_expiry <= T_MAX) → (result >= 0.0) := sorry
